bondInfo.name: Yan
bondInfo.desc: [Yan] Operators' ATK increases by (23 + 0.9 × stacks)% <With 6 different [Yan] Operators on field> At the start of battle, 'Yan's Protection' is summoned with ATK and HP equal to 30% of the total ATK and HP of all [Yan] Operators at that moment. 'Yan's Protection' attacks 3 enemies at once, inflicts Burn damage equals to 20% ATK, inflicts 20% Elemental Fragility on nearby enemies, and periodically use 'Cleansing Flame'. <With 9 different Yan operators on field> Instead summon 2 'Yan's Protections'; 'Yan's Protections' have 1.5x ATK, and reduce damage taken by 90%

bondInfo.name: Sargon
bondInfo.desc: When any [Sargon] Operator activates a skill, all [Sargon] Operators temporarily gain +12 ASPD (up to a +300) for (5 + 0.22 × stacks) seconds <With 6 different [Sargon] Operators on field> Skill activations will also cause all [Sargon] Operators to temporarily gain increased ATK (up to +300%) for the same duration

bondInfo.name: Victoria
bondInfo.desc: [Victoria] Operators carrying equipment deal (120 + 0.8 × stacks)% damage <Every 25 stacks> Obtain 1 random Victorian Hammer <With 6 different [Victoria] Operators on field> For every piece of equipment equipped, [Victoria] Operators gain +50% ATK; every upgraded piece of equipment instead grants +80% ATK

bondInfo.name: Kjerag
bondInfo.desc: [Kjerag] Operators deal 125% damage, and deal (135 + 1 × stacks)% to Cold and Frozen enemies <With 6 different [Kjerag] Operators on field> A chill gust blows on the battlefield every 25 seconds, inflicting Cold on enemies for (20 × 0.1 × stacks) seconds

bondInfo.name: Laterano
bondInfo.desc: [Laterano] Operators gain (5 + 1.5 × stacks)% ammo on skill activation (rounded down) <With 6 different [Laterano] Operators on field> All [Laterano] Operators gain +4% ATK when any [Laterano] Operator spends 1 bullet, up to +200%

bondInfo.name: Ægir
bondInfo.desc: [Ægir] Operators' +(35 + 1 × stacks)% HP When the battle begins, [Ægir] Operators will devour the Operator on the tile in front of them, dealing 5000 Physical damage to the Operator and gaining their base ATK and Block, while adding [Ægir] stacks equal to the devoured Operator's Tier <With 5 different [Ægir] Operators on the field> The first 3 defeated will immediately revive

bondInfo.name: Kazimierz
bondInfo.desc: Each time an Operator is deployed, [Kazimierz] Operators gain +20% ATK (up to +(50 + 1 × stacks)%). <With 6 different Kazimierz Operators on the field> While blocking enemies, Kazimierz Operators deal True damage equal to 120% ATK and Stun nearby enemies (within a radius of 0.8) for 0.1 seconds every 2 seconds. While not blocking enemies, each instance of damage they deal additionally inflicts True damage equal to 30% ATK.

bondInfo.name: Siracusa
bondInfo.desc: [Siracusa] Operators gain +(25 + 0.8 × stacks) ASPD for (32 + 0.4 × stacks) seconds after deployment. <With 6 different Siracusa Operators on the field>After deployment, Siracusa Operators also gain Invisiblity for the same duration. While Invisible, and for 10 seconds after leaving Invisible, their attacks have a 3% chance to deal (5000 + 50 × stacks) True damage, and Fear the target for 3 seconds.

bondInfo.name: Investor
bondInfo.desc: Operators' 'When obtained' Attributes trigger twice <At 100 stacks> 'When obtained' Attributes trigger 3 times instead [Investor] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance

bondInfo.name: Harmony
bondInfo.desc: The [Harmony] Alliance grants +1 Operator count to Core Alliances ([Yan], [Sargon], [Victoria], [Kjerag], [Laterano], [Ægir], [Siracusa] and [Kazimierz]); [Harmony] Operators also gain effects from said activated Alliances

bondInfo.name: Foresight
bondInfo.desc: <For every 10 stacks added> Gain +2 Funds <At 80 stacks (first-time only)> [Foresight] Operators cost 1 less Funds permanently <At 150 stacks (first-time only)> The above effect becomes: All Dispatch Center Operators cost 1 less Funds permanently [Foresight] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance

bondInfo.name: Precision
bondInfo.desc: [Precision] Operators (10 + 1.2 × stacks)% ATK <With 3 different [Precision] Operators on field> High Ground Operators also gain the effect, and attacks ignore 30% DEF and RES

bondInfo.name: Durable
bondInfo.desc: All Operators gain +(25 + 1.2 × stacks)% HP <With 3 different [Durable] Operators on the field> Whenever a non-[Durable] Operator takes damage, 40% of that damage is split among all [Durable] Operators on field, and deal (850 + 10 × stacks) Arts damage and inflict 40% Fragile to the attacker (once every 0.2 seconds)

bondInfo.name: Raid
bondInfo.desc: If a [Raid] Operator has not attacked for 10 seconds or their skill is ready with no enemies in their attack range, they will redeploy near a ground enemy while conserving their current SP. During this, they gain +(25 + 1 × stacks)% ATK and HP <At 50 stacks> All Operators +50 ATKSPD

bondInfo.name: Marvel
bondInfo.desc: On Dispatch Center refresh, there is a (18 + 0.3 × stacks)% chance the next refresh will be free <Every 100 stacks> Gain 20 Funds [Marvel] Operators on Bench can also count toward activating this Alliance

bondInfo.name: Resilient
bondInfo.desc: When a Ground Operator is defeated, there is a (18 + 0.4 × stacks)% chance they will immediately redeploy <With 3 different [Resilient] Operators on field> When defeated, Ground Operators grant +5 SP to all Operators on the field

bondInfo.name: Swift
bondInfo.desc: [Swift] Operators have a (20 + 0.35 × stacks)% chance when their skill ends to immediately recover 12 SP <At 40 stacks> All Operators have the same chance to recover 15 SP when their skill ends

bondInfo.name: Aid
bondInfo.desc: All Operators gain +(15 + 1.2 × stacks)% DEF and -30% Redeployment Time When Rest Phase ends, +2 stacks to all active Alliances <With 3 different [Aid] Operators on field> +4 stacks instead

bondInfo.name: Agile
bondInfo.desc: [Agile] Operators and Operators in the 4 adjacent tiles around them gain +(10 + 1 × stacks) ASPD <At 40 stacks> The above effects extends to 8 adjacent tiles

bondInfo.name: Arcane
bondInfo.desc: Whenever [Arcane] Operators deal damage, their target receive (20 + 1 × stacks)% more Arts damage for 3 seconds.<With 3 different [Arcane] Operators on field> Damage increase against enemies with 50% or less HP is increased to (68 + 1.4 × stacks)%

bondInfo.name: Solo
bondInfo.desc: The [Solo] Operator gains +60% HP and ATK, and gains +15 initial SP. At 2 [Solo] Operators on field, this Alliance deactivates

bondInfo.name: Assist_Operator
bondInfo.desc: All Operators take -20% Physical and Arts damage [Assist Operators] deal 120% more damage; Elite [Assist Operators] deal 140% more damage

bondInfo.name: Elite
bondInfo.desc: <With 2 promoted Operators on field> Promoted Operators +30% ATK <With 5 promoted Operators on field> Promoted Operators -30% SP cost
